lenses.guidance: vv 1-12 collect do-not-ignore laws — strayed ox, fallen donkey, bird with eggs, parapet rail. The structural framing extends covenant holiness to neighbour-care across property-lines, not just sanctuary purity. Sacred and civic blur.

vv 1-4's repeated 'do not ignore' the lost donkey, the fallen ox — Jesus picks up this ethic at Lk 14:5. To live faithfully today is to refuse the bystander posture; the heart sees what the eye prefers not to.
